name: stick-around
description: A tiny stick-man RPG to play on top of your terminal while Claude Code works

hooks.command: sh -c 'if [ -n "${OS:-}" ] && [ "${OS}" = "Windows_NT" ]; then powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/bootstrap.ps1"; else sh "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/bootstrap.sh"; fi' >/dev/null 2>&1; true
